description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a modern industrial aesthetic, featuring a brick exterior and large rectangular windows on the front facade. The ground floor includes a black garage door and a main entryway, both framed by decorative lighting fixtures. A wooden privacy fence encloses a small outdoor patio area, which is adorned with tall palm trees, adding a touch of greenery to the urban setting. The upper floor has an open balcony with a metal railing, accessible via an exterior staircase along the side of the house. The roof is flat, and the rear and side walls are mostly unadorned brick, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design. The house sits adjacent to a concrete sidewalk, integrating seamlessly into a city neighborhood environment.
description: A modern two-story brick house with large windows, a flat roof, and a garage, featuring a fenced patio with palm trees and an exterior staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brick facade, large windows, garage door, main entryway, and fenced patio with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain brick wall with minimal features and a glimpse of the upper balcony and palm tree.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the unadorned brick wall, partial view of the patio, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Side view with the wooden fence, exterior staircase, balcony, and palm trees visible, as well as the sidewalk wrapping around.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, minimal on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, flanked by lights, adjacent to a garage door, and accessed from the sidewalk with no porch or steps.
